headline: How Investors May Respond To Texas Instruments (TXN) Balancing AI Data Center Demand With Margin Pressure
summary: In recent months, Texas Instruments reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, highlighted accelerating demand from AI-driven data centers and industrial customers, and attracted bullish commentary from several Wall Street firms about its long-term potential in analog semiconductors. At the same time, the company’s push to defend its leading analog position through heavier investment has weighed on margins and free cash flow, creating a tension between its AI-fueled growth opportunity and...
